evals.name: berakhot-2a-flow
evals.prompt: Can you map out Berakhot 2a for me so I can follow the back-and-forth of the gemara? Hebrew is good.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML file with a Mermaid flowchart of the Berakhot 2a sugya (Mishnah -> gemara question 'tana heicha kai' -> answers/objections), auto-expanded to ~2b:4, RTL Hebrew, color-coded nodes, and a quotes panel with original Aramaic + Hebrew translation. Grounded only in the fetched Sefaria text.

evals.name: bava-metzia-2a-dispute
evals.prompt: Make me a sugya flowchart for Bava Metzia 2a — the shnayim ochazin ba'talit one. I want to see how the dispute and the proofs branch out.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML flowchart of the opening Bava Metzia sugya (two holding a garment), showing the dispute/claims structure with branching, color-coded nodes, RTL Hebrew, and a quotes panel (original + Hebrew translation). Different tractate; should exercise machloket branching.

evals.name: shabbat-2a-teaching
evals.prompt: I'm reviewing Shabbat 2a with my students this week. Can you visualize how that opening sugya flows so they can follow the logic?
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML flowchart of the opening Shabbat 2a sugya (yetziot ha'Shabbat / the carrying cases), accessible for students, RTL Hebrew, color-coded by move-type, with a quotes panel pairing original Aramaic and Hebrew translation. Grounded only in fetched text.
